name: @fiserv/prototype-2-agent-pay
description: Pay-by-Agent x402 Commerce Prototype - AI agents purchasing from merchants via stablecoin payments

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix gateway && npm install --prefix verifier && npm install --prefix settler && npm install --prefix demo-agent && npm install --prefix dashboard && cd agent-sdk/typescript && npm install
scripts.dev: echo 'Run in separate terminals: npm run gateway | npm run verifier | npm run settler | npm run dashboard'
